user.title: Solar Irrigation — Setup
user.description:
Location defaults to your HA home. Zone names and geometry are configured later in the Lovelace card.

Kc presets: {kc_hint}

data.name: Installation name
data.mm_per_min: Flow rate (mm/min) — same for all zones
data.threshold_mm: Irrigation threshold (mm deficit) — same for all zones
data.kc_preset: Grass / plant type — same for all zones

et0.title: Solar Irrigation — ET0 Source
et0.description: ET0 is the daily reference evapotranspiration. 'Fixed' is simplest; 'Weather' auto-calculates from your weather entity.

data.irradiance_weighted: Weight shadow by solar irradiance (sin²·⁵ elevation) — more accurate

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON — please check the syntax.

init.title: Solar Irrigation — Settings
init.description: Zones and buildings can be edited as JSON for advanced users.
